title: ActuationSensingEventArchetype (GSM v1)
description: EventArchetype specialization for sensing feedback (Sensor → Controller). Cybernetic flow step 6: Sensor's Effector emits structured verification (SensingFeedbackEvent) that the Controller's feedbackReceptor receives, populating the variable assigned to the sys.* return value and closing the homeostatic loop. Base contract for ActuationFeedbackEventSchema as referenced in GSM Sensing validation rules. SIE-seeded: one instance per tenant, reused across all Sensings. Only derived for closed-loop actuations (return-value-assignment in Rule body).

schema.description: Must reference the SensingFeedbackEvent payload schema (sie://schemas/events/v1/SensingFeedbackEvent.json).

x-sie-seed.autoDerivation: Derived by Definition Manager ONLY when sys.create/modify/delete/acquire return value is assigned to a variable in the Rule body (closed-loop actuation).
